name: Inline Pattern Followed By Constraint
description: n ? Foo: — semantically the inline source is Constraint(Foo,nil). WILL_FAIL_UNTIL_FIX: parser current behavior is Constraint(Pattern(n,[Branch(Foo,nil)]),nil) because inline parses RHS at RANGE=11 which exceeds CONSTRAINT=8, so : binds outside. Fix: inline pattern RHS should accept CONSTRAINT-level forms.
